inspiration: Bold brush-painted tapa cloth and body tattoo art
scene: A wide horizontal panel filled with bold {{theme_name}} motifs painted in light grey on a near-black ground. A central simplified {{centerpiece_type}} surrounded by a few large spirals, broad flat bands, and chunky shapes. Fewer elements overall — each one is big, thick, and given plenty of breathing room.

subjects.description: simplified and abstracted version of {{centerpiece_description}} — reduced to essential shapes with thick flat bands for features, fewer fine details
subjects.pose: front-facing, perfectly symmetrical, integrated into the pattern
subjects.size: small and compact — occupies only the center 1/4 of the total width (the tile is 4:1 ratio, the face fits in a 1:1 square in the exact center)
subjects.interaction: directly connected to the surrounding patterns — spirals and shapes flow seamlessly into and out of the face with no gaps

subjects.description: a few large bold {{theme_name}} spirals and {{motifs_short}} motifs painted with very thick strokes on dark ground. Spirals originate directly from the face — growing out of the cheeks, chin, and forehead. Dark space between spirals but not between spirals and face.
subjects.position: immediately adjacent to and extending from the central motif
subjects.pose: flowing outward from the face, connected
subjects.size: very large — few elements, each one thick and chunky
subjects.interaction: directly touching and merging into the central {{centerpiece_type}} — patterns grow out of the face edges with zero gap between face and patterns

style: screen-print aesthetic with bold flat shapes painted on a dark ground. Thick brush strokes, a few large spirals, visible paint texture and slight grunge. High contrast between dark negative space and lighter painted areas. Fewer elements, each one larger — more dark breathing room between shapes.

color_palette.note: Light grey shapes on near-black ground. The dark areas stay dark after tinting, the light shapes take the color.

lighting: flat with subtle highlight variation across painted shapes, dark ground absorbs light

background.details: Deep near-black ground (#0C0A08) visible between the painted shapes. The dark ground occupies roughly 40% of the surface.

composition: wide 4:1 horizontal banner. Small {{centerpiece_type}} face centered (fits in center quarter), with patterns flowing directly out of the face edges into the sides — everything is connected as one continuous design. Bilateral symmetry, dark negative space between the painted shapes.
textures: slight grunge and paint texture on the flat shapes, subtle ink bleed at edges of strokes, matte finish
effects: continuous pattern flow across full width
usage_notes: Master tile: light grey shapes on near-black ground. Cropped to 4 sizes and tinted programmatically. Dark areas stay dark, light painted shapes take the tint color. Keep strokes big and bold — readable at small sizes. Fully opaque, sharp corners, edge-to-edge.
